companyNameJapanese: TOPPANホールディングス株式会社
description: World-leading photomask manufacturer through subsidiary Tekscend Photomask (formerly Toppan Photomask). Joint EUV photomask R&D with IBM. Planning 2nm photomask production by 2026.

_externalRelationships.notes: Tekscend Photomask renamed Nov 2024. 2nm EUV photomask for Rapidus. High-NA EUV development.
